summary: j1-step1 backend plain event publish fix completed: the server publish chain now snapshots ORM Event into a plain event dict before projector/redis/webhook/console consumption, WebProjector builds EventEnvelope from plain event data instead of model_validate(orm_event), ConsoleProjector also consumes plain dict, and all direct publish_event call paths in community.py now go through a single stabilization+snapshot helper. local validation was limited to py_compile on every changed python file plus source confirmation that publish_event first plain_event_snapshot()s and community.py no longer passes ORM Event directly into the publish layer.
tests: source check: event_bus.publish_event() now snapshots to plain_event before downstream publishing
source check: WebProjector and ConsoleProjector now consume plain event dict, and community.py routes direct publish paths through _publish_plain_events()
